title: MLLER SKATEBOARDS
description: We create limited edition hand made skateboards. Each are made from rare and exotic materials from an old lumber yard with no name that is equally as weird as our mill. We pick out as much crazy wood as we strap to our bikes and ride back to the mill. Each deck is made uniquely based on however Simon is feeling that day, so each one is completely unique of course.
